response.justification: While the candidate is a highly experienced Staff-level engineer with a strong background in TypeScript and cloud infrastructure, they fall significantly short of the core requirement of 8+ years of experience building AI-driven solutions. Their exposure to AI, agents, and MCP is limited to their most recent role, and they lack foundational required skills like Python, Vector Databases, and RAG architectures.
strengths: Extensive Staff-level software engineering experience with strong architectural capabilities and a proven track record of technical leadership.
Highly proficient in TypeScript, Node.js, and AWS (CDK), which aligns well with the cloud and language preferences of the role.
Recent hands-on exposure to relevant GenAI infrastructure, including Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers and agentic workflows.
concerns: Lacks the strictly required minimum of 8 years building and shipping production-grade AI solutions.
Missing critical required technologies from their profile, notably Python, Vector Databases, and Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG).
No demonstrated experience leading customer-facing technical discovery sessions or consulting on enterprise AI integrations.
